description: 28 pages from a cookbook in Catalan. The hand is 15th-century according to Eleazar Gutwirth. Many recipes for dishes containing meat and fish. Soups and baked goods, too. It is interesting to note that pork is mentioned several times. Information kindly provided by Ilil Baum via a discussion on Facebook, 01/2021.
description_he: 28 עמודים מספר בישול בקטלאנית; כתב יד מהמאה ה-15; מתכונים רבים לבשר ודגים; מרקים ומאפים; חזיר מוזכר מספר פעמים
